full_text_rationale: Full text describes TAI3 maintaining and updating a datatype-aware strategy memory of successful mutation patterns, retrieving/adapting them for new seed tasks, with evaluation over 80 toolkit APIs.
extractor_notes: Fresh search architecture extraction batch 006; controlled-comparison and quality status remain pending aggregate recomputation.
autores: Shiwei Feng, Xiangzhe Xu, Xuan Chen, Kaiyuan Zhang, Syed Yusuf Ahmed, Zian Su, Mingwei Zheng, Xiangyu Zhang
titulo: TAI3: Testing Agent Integrity in Interpreting User Intent
formato_armazenamento: Datatype-aware strategy memory stores successful mutation strategies indexed by parameter datatype and integrity category; novel strategies are added after an LLM duplicate check and top strategies are adapted for later seed tasks.
framework_agente: TAI3 API-centric stress-testing framework for LLM agents
llm_utilizado: GPT-4o-mini as default testing LLM, phi4-mini for prioritization, Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen3-30B-A3B, Claude-3.5-Haiku, Gemini-2.5-Pro, GPT-o3-mini and other target models
benchmarks_utilizados: 80 toolkit APIs, 233 parameters, five domains: Finance, Healthcare, Smart Home, Logistics, and Office
metricas_desempenho: Error-Exposing Success Rate (EESR), Average Queries to First Failure (AQFF), per-domain/category/model deltas
baseline_comparado: SelfRef baseline and ablations/generalization settings with different testing and target models
tamanho_memoria_ao_longo_tempo: Strategy memory grows as successful mutation strategies are added when non-duplicative; no long-run memory-size curve is reported.
reducao_tokens: NR; reports query-efficiency through AQFF rather than token reduction.
resultado_principal: TAI3 consistently outperforms the SelfRef baseline in EESR across domains and input categories. In the VALID category it improves EESR by up to 15.5 points in Finance for Llama-3.1-8B and by 10.0 points in Office for GPT-4o-mini.
desempenho_vs_baseline: Table 1 reports broad EESR gains over SelfRef, including Finance GPT-4o-mini VALID 41.5 to 61.0 (+19.5), Healthcare GPT-4o-mini INVALID 44.7 to 57.4 (+12.7), and Office Llama-3.1-8B UNDERSPEC 65.7 to 82.0 (+16.3).
custo_vs_baseline: TAI3 reduces AQFF by up to 12% in the UNDERSPEC setting, indicating fewer target-agent queries to expose the first failure; no monetary cost is reported.
limitacoes: Focuses on intent-integrity testing rather than production coding assistance; no monetary/token cost data; memory stores mutation strategies rather than software-repair knowledge.
ameacas_validade: Toolkit/API selection, domain coverage, generated task realism, target-model selection, LLM duplicate judgments, and query-budget settings may affect validity.
